brief.title: Crystal Circuit
brief.oneSentencePitch: Dash and double-jump a nimble robot through linear lava-filled stages, collecting every energy crystal to unlock the exit.
brief.playerFantasy: Feel like an agile precision robot threading through molten danger to secure vital energy.
coreLoop: Run and double-jump through platforms and gaps
Time movements to avoid falling into static lava pools
Collect all visible energy crystals in the level
Reach the exit door to finish the stage
Respawn at checkpoints after lava deaths and try again
keyMechanics: Fast, agile robot movement with snappy acceleration
Double-jump for extended reach and midair correction
Mandatory collection of all energy crystals to open exit
Static lava pools that instantly kill on contact
Checkpoint flags that save progress within a level

controls.primary: Digital left/right movement, jump, and double-jump with context-based controls.
controls.mobile: On-screen left/right buttons and a jump button that supports double-tap for double-jump.
accessibilityNotes: Add configurable button size and spacing

runtimePlan.phaserRole: 2D scene graph, tilemaps, sprites, input, UI, level flow.
runtimePlan.threeRole: Optional 2.5D background layers and subtle parallax effects.
runtimePlan.rapierRole: Character collisions, grounded checks, simple rigidbody physics.
runtimePlan.godotStyleGenerationNotes: Single Level scene with Robot, LavaAreas, Crystals, Checkpoints, Exit; reusable LevelRoot and UI HUD nodes.

assetsToGenerate: Agile robot sprite with idle, run, jump, death
assetPlan.visualStyle: Clean 2D pixel art, bright crystals and robot silhouettes against dark, molten factory-cavern backdrops.

followUpQuestions.question: How many levels should the first playable version include?
Beyond collecting all crystals to finish, should there be an extra scoring layer?

options.label: Yes, track time and show best time per level
No, only completion and crystal count for now

followUpQuestions.question: How punishing should lava be for the robot?

options.label: Instant death with limited lives per level

productionNotes: Prioritize one polished linear level as a reference, then clone and tweak.
Implement tight, responsive movement and double-jump before adding extras.
Keep lava as simple kill volumes without physics interaction.
Use a minimal HUD: crystal counter, deaths (optional), and pause.
nonGoals: Complex combat or enemies in the first version

requirements.description: Clean 2D pixel art, bright crystals and robot silhouettes against dark, molten factory-cavern backdrops. platformer hero

HUD or UI element for score, health, or timer

metadata.title: Untitled Game
metadata.description: Mobile-friendly hybrid 2D/2.5D precision platformer: guide an agile teal robot across oceanic factory platforms, collect every crystal to open the exit, and avoid lava-like energy pits and patrolling drones. Checkpoints and double-jump are approximated with simple behaviors and collision sensors; there is no advanced coyote-time or variable jump height.

ui.text: Tap left/right edges to move, center to jump (double-tap for double-jump).
